system_prompt: You are an expert prompt engineer for AI image generation. Convert scene descriptions into detailed, high-quality prompts for 3D anime style images. Focus on Pixar-quality 3D animation aesthetic with smooth cel shading.

style_prefixes.anime_3d: 3D anime style, Pixar quality, smooth cel shading, beautiful lighting, clean renders, Disney animation quality
style_prefixes.anime_3d_dramatic: 3D anime style, dramatic cinematic lighting, volumetric light, epic atmosphere, Pixar quality
style_prefixes.anime_3d_soft: 3D anime style, soft studio lighting, gentle shadows, warm colors, Pixar quality
style_prefixes.anime_3d_neon: 3D anime style, neon lights, cyberpunk atmosphere, glowing effects, Pixar quality
style_prefixes.anime_3d_outdoor: 3D anime style, natural outdoor lighting, sun rays, beautiful sky, Pixar quality
style_prefixes.anime_2d: 2D anime style, hand drawn aesthetic, vibrant colors, detailed illustration
style_prefixes.cartoon: cartoon style, bold lines, vibrant colors, exaggerated features
style_prefixes.watercolor: watercolor painting, soft edges, artistic, traditional art

negative_prompt.default: blurry, low quality, distorted, deformed, ugly, bad anatomy, watermark, signature, text, logo, cropped
negative_prompt.anime_3d: realistic photo, live action, western cartoon, rough lines, low poly, ps2 graphics, ugly 3d, bad shading, plastic look
negative_prompt.realistic: anime, cartoon, illustration, drawing, sketch, 3D render

vertical_9_16.tags: vertical composition, portrait orientation, mobile optimized

lighting_presets.studio_soft: soft studio lighting, gentle shadows, even illumination
lighting_presets.studio_dramatic: dramatic studio lighting, strong shadows, high contrast
lighting_presets.golden_hour: golden hour lighting, warm sunset glow, orange rim light
lighting_presets.blue_hour: blue hour lighting, cool twilight tones, soft shadows
lighting_presets.neon: neon lighting, colorful glow, cyberpunk atmosphere
lighting_presets.backlight: backlighting, rim light, silhouette edge glow
lighting_presets.outdoor_natural: natural outdoor lighting, sun rays, soft shadows

enhancement_rules: Add 3D anime specific terms: smooth shading, expressive features
Include lighting details: volumetric, soft, dramatic, rim light
Specify render quality: Pixar quality, Disney animation
Add camera angle: cinematic, dynamic, low angle, bird's eye
Include color palette: vibrant, pastel, warm, cool tones
Add atmosphere: magical, peaceful, dramatic, mysterious

character_enhancements.face: detailed expressive eyes, smooth skin, defined features
character_enhancements.hair: detailed flowing hair, individual strands visible, shiny
character_enhancements.clothing: detailed fabric texture, realistic folds, material definition
character_enhancements.pose: natural pose, dynamic stance, expressive body language

scene_enhancements.indoor: detailed interior, ambient occlusion, soft indoor lighting
scene_enhancements.outdoor: detailed environment, atmospheric perspective, natural lighting
scene_enhancements.fantasy: magical atmosphere, glowing effects, ethereal lighting
scene_enhancements.urban: detailed architecture, city lights, modern environment
